title: bidens × peacockii
intro: Bidens × peacockii, also known as Peacock's Bidens, is a rare and unique flowering plant that is a hybrid of the Bidens pilosa and Bidens ferulifolia species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bidens × peacockii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and nausea. Bidens × peacockii can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
